title: "Premium Dog Bowl - Non-Slip Pet Feeding Bowls for Dogs & Puppies, Durable Plastic Pet Food Water Dish with Anti-Slip Base (7 Colours, 4 Sizes) - Ideal for Small Medium Large XL Breeds" (White, s)
features: MULTIPLE SIZES AVAILABLE - Our pet bowls are available in 4 practical sizes (S:11 cm, M:14 cm, L:17.5 cm, XL:22 cm) and are suitable for all breeds of dogs from Chihuahuas to Great Danes. You can pick the pet feeding bowls you are satisfied with here
HIGH QUALITY NON-TOXIC MATERIALS - Our dog bowls are made of high quality materials, safe for daily use. Dishwasher safe, easy to clean and chew/scratch resistant
NON-SLIP STABILITY - Unique weighted base with rubber ring prevents spills and sliding during meals, making it easy to use even for energetic diners. Suitable for tile, wood or laminate floors
VAST COLOUR CHOICE - Choose from 7 stylish colours (black, white, yellow, blue, pink, green, red) to match your home décor or to differentiate food/water bowls
MULTIFUNCTIONAL DESIGN - Suitable for wet/dry food, water or snacks. Ergonomic shape prevents ‘dog whisker fatigue’. Stackable for storage to save space
description: Upgrade your pet’s mealtime with our Premium Non-Slip Dog Bowl, designed for comfort, stability, and style. Available in 7 vibrant colours (Black, White, Yellow, Blue, Pink, Green, Red) and 4 sizes (S, M, L, XL), this bowl is perfect for dogs of all breeds—from tiny Chihuahuas to large German Shepherds. Why Choose Our Dog Bowl? ✅ Optimal Feeding Comfort Gentle on Whiskers: The smooth, wide rim prevents "whisker fatigue," making mealtime more comfortable. ✅ Superior Stability & Spill-Proof Design Weighted, Non-Slip Base: Stays firmly in place, even with energetic eaters. Deep Well Design: Minimises spills, keeping floors clean. ✅ Durable & Safe Materials BPA-Free & Non-Toxic: free from harmful chemicals. Dishwasher & Microwave Safe: Easy to clean and sterilise. ✅ Versatile for All Needs Multi-Use: Ideal for dry/wet food, water, or treats. Stackable for Storage: Saves space in your kitchen or pet corner. ✅ Stylish & Practical 7 Trendy Colours: Matches any home décor. 4 Sizes for Every Dog Perfect for Every Dog’s Needs 🐾 Puppies: Lightweight & easy to clean, ideal for training. 🐾 Adult Dogs: Sturdy enough for daily use without tipping. 🐾 Senior Dogs: Comfortable height reduces neck strain. 🐾 Multi-Dog Homes: Colour-coding helps avoid mix-ups. Care & Maintenance 🔹 Dishwasher Safe (top rack recommended) 🔹 Microwave Safe (up to 3 minutes for warming food) 🔹 Hand Wash with mild soap for daily cleaning 🔹 UV-Resistant: Colours stay vibrant even with outdoor use Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Q: Is this bowl suitable for cats? A: Yes! While designed for dogs, cats can also use it for food or water. Q: Can it be used outdoors? A: Absolutely! The UV-resistant material prevents fading. Q: How do I choose the right size? A: Refer to our size guide above or measure your dog’s current bowl. Order Now & Give Your Pet the Best! Upgrade your furry friend’s dining experience with our Premium Non-Slip Dog Bowl—durable, stylish, and designed for happy, mess-free mealtimes!
